title: Mappings, Sets, and Nested Data · Changed-Input Lab
summary: Index community resources, remove duplicates, compare inventories, and merge changed records. The scenario, data, constraints, and failure modes differ from the workshop. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of a deduplicated resource inventory with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Create, access, update, delete, and test dictionary entries with deliberate missing-key behavior.
Iterate keys, values, and item views while preserving insertion order and avoiding size changes during iteration.
Merge mappings and update nested records with explicit conflict, copy, and schema policies.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
